title: smilax neocaledonica
intro: Smilax neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonian Smilax or Smilax, is a climbing plant species native to New Caledonia. It is a type of flowering plant in the Smilacaceae family and is often used for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Smilax neocaledonica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been used to help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections.
